Name: Evergreen/Deciduous Needleleaf Trees
Definition: Needleleaf tree cover (evergreen and deciduous combined)

Name: Mixed/Other Trees
Definition: Mixed forest and tree cover not assignable to classes 1-3

Name: Herbaceous Vegetation
Definition: Natural grasses and non-woody herbaceous cover

Name: Regularly Flooded Vegetation
Definition: Wetlands; vegetation subject to regular flooding

Name: Barren
Definition: Bare soil, rock, sand and sparsely vegetated ground
